theme: From brief to 600 delegates in 9 weeks — a rescue brief

linkedin.text:
The call came on a Tuesday: a 600-delegate congress, nine weeks out, and the original organizer had walked. No confirmed venue contract. A speaker program half-built. A registration list nobody trusted.

Most teams would have said "not enough runway." We said "send us everything tonight."

In 72 hours we re-secured the venue, rebuilt the production timeline backwards from doors-open, and put one project lead in front of the client so they only ever had one number to call. Over nine weeks: 600 delegates checked in, a four-track program ran on time, and the post-event NPS came back at 71.

Rescue briefs aren't about heroics — they're about a team that can absorb chaos and hand back calm. If something's slipping on your 2026 event, the earlier you call, the more we can save. DM us or book a call.

#EventProduction #CorporateEvents #Congress #EventProfs #MICE

Rescue isn't heroics. It's a team that absorbs chaos and hands back calm. 🧘

image_prompt: A focused event project lead at a glass-walled war room late at night, sleeves rolled up, surrounded by printed run-sheets and a wall of sticky-note timelines, phone to ear and laptop open, city lights through the window, calm-under-pressure energy. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
